displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The Clone Wars Vol. 1
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Republic #49-54; Star Wars: Jedi One-Shots (Mace Windu, Shaak Ti, Aayla Secura, Count Dooku, Yoda); and material from Star Wars Tales #14 & 19 and Star Wars Visionaries OGN.
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Clone Wars Vol. 1
